text: Quy du phong nen bang bao nhieu thang chi tieu?
explanation: 6 thang la khuyen nghi pho bien. Du de trang trai khi mat viec hoac gap su co bat ngo, trong khi khong giu qua nhieu tien nhan roi.

text: Lai suat 12%/nam tra hang thang thi lai suat thang la bao nhieu?
explanation: Lai suat thang = lai suat nam / 12. 12% / 12 = 1%/thang. Chu y day la lai suat don gian, lai suat kep se khac.

text: ETF la gi?
choices: A. Loai co phieu dac biet
B. Quy dau tu mo phong chi so
explanation: ETF (Exchange-Traded Fund) la quy dau tu mo phong chi so, giao dich nhu co phieu. Vi du VFMVN30 mo phong 30 co phieu lon nhat san HOSE.

text: Theo quy tac 50/30/20, 20% thu nhap dung de lam gi?
choices: C. Tiet kiem va dau tu
explanation: 50% cho nhu cau (nha, an, di lai), 30% cho mong muon (giai tri, mua sam), 20% cho tiet kiem va dau tu.

text: Nen tra no nao truoc?
choices: C. No lai suat cao nhat
explanation: Tra no lai suat cao nhat truoc (VD: the tin dung 2-4%/thang) se giam tong tien lai phai tra. Day la phuong phap 'Avalanche'.

text: Lam phat 4%/nam co nghia la gi?
choices: B. Gia ca tang trung binh 4%
explanation: Lam phat la muc tang gia chung cua hang hoa. 4%/nam nghia la 1 trieu dong nam nay chi mua duoc hang tri gia ~960K nam truoc.

text: P/E ratio cua co phieu la gi?
choices: A. Gia / Thu nhap moi co phieu
D. Co tuc / Gia co phieu
explanation: P/E = Price / Earnings per share. P/E cao co the la co phieu dat (hoac ky vong tang truong cao), P/E thap co the la re (hoac it tang truong).

text: Diversification (da dang hoa) giup gi?
choices: A. Tang loi nhuan toi da
B. Giam rui ro tong the
explanation: Khong bo tat ca trung vao 1 gio. Da dang hoa kenh dau tu giup khi 1 kenh giam, cac kenh khac co the bu lai.

text: Lai suat kep (compound interest) dac biet o cho nao?
choices: B. Tinh lai tren ca goc va lai truoc do
D. Chi ap dung cho ngan hang
explanation: Lai kep = tinh lai tren goc + lai da tich luy. Vi du: 100tr lai 10%/nam, nam 1 duoc 10tr, nam 2 duoc 11tr (10% cua 110tr). Thoi gian cang dai, hieu qua cang lon.

text: Gui tiet kiem 10 trieu/thang voi lai 7%/nam, sau 10 nam duoc khoang bao nhieu?
explanation: Voi lai kep hang thang, 10tr/thang x 120 thang + lai = khoang 1.73 ty. Trong do goc la 1.2 ty, lai la ~530 trieu. Suc manh cua lai kep!

text: The tin dung co lai suat 3%/THANG. Quy ra nam la bao nhieu?
explanation: Lai kep: (1+0.03)^12 - 1 = 42.6%/nam. Khong phai don gian 3x12=36%. Day la ly do tra no the tin dung la uu tien so 1!

text: Chung chi quy (fund certificate) khac co phieu o diem nao?
choices: B. Dau tu vao nhieu tai san, co chuyen gia quan ly
explanation: Chung chi quy la gop tien voi nhieu nguoi, chuyen gia quan ly dau tu vao nhieu co phieu/trai phieu. Phu hop nguoi moi, khong co thoi gian tu nghien cuu.

text: ROI la gi?
choices: B. Ty suat sinh loi tren von dau tu
explanation: ROI = Return on Investment = (Loi nhuan - Chi phi) / Chi phi x 100%. Vi du: dau tu 100tr, loi 120tr → ROI = 20%.

text: Nen bat dau dau tu khi nao?
choices: B. Khi da co quy du phong va het no lai cao
explanation: Dieu kien tien quyet: co quy du phong 6 thang + het no lai cao (the tin dung, vay tieu dung). Sau do bat dau voi so nho, hoc dan.

text: Trai phieu chinh phu duoc coi la?
choices: A. Rui ro cao, loi nhuan cao
B. Rui ro thap, loi nhuan thap
D. Chi danh cho ngan hang
explanation: Trai phieu chinh phu co rui ro thap nhat (duoc chinh phu bao lanh) nhung lai suat cung thap hon co phieu hay quy. Phu hop nguoi khong chap nhan rui ro.

text: Cashback 1% tren the tin dung nghia la gi?
choices: A. Duoc giam gia 1% khi mua
B. Duoc hoan 1% so tien chi tieu ve tai khoan
explanation: Cashback = hoan tien. Chi tieu 10 trieu → duoc hoan 100K. Nhung dung vi cashback ma chi tieu nhieu hon binh thuong!

text: DCA (Dollar Cost Averaging) la gi?
choices: A. Mua nhieu khi gia thap
B. Dau tu deu dan hang thang bat ke gia
C. Chi dau tu khi thi truong tot
D. Rut loi nhuan hang thang
explanation: DCA = dau tu so tien co dinh deu dan (VD: 5tr/thang vao quy). Khi gia cao mua it don vi, gia thap mua nhieu — trung binh hoa gia mua.

text: Bao hiem nhan tho co phai la dau tu khong?
choices: A. Co, la dau tu tot
B. Khong, la san pham bao ve
C. Chi la dau tu neu mua loai lien ket
explanation: Bao hiem nhan tho la san pham BAO VE (rui ro tu vong, benh tat), KHONG phai dau tu. San pham lien ket dau tu co yeu to dau tu nhung phi cao, loi nhuan khong dam bao.

text: Vay tra gop mua dien thoai 0% co thuc su mien phi?
choices: A. Co, hoan toan mien phi
B. Thuong co phi xu ly hoac gia san pham cao hon
C. Chi mien phi neu tra dung han
explanation: Tra gop 0% thuong co phi xu ly ho so (1-3%), hoac gia san pham da duoc nang len so voi tra thang. Luon so sanh gia tra thang vs tra gop.

text: Khi nao nen xem xet mua vang?
choices: A. Khi gia vang dang tang
B. De da dang hoa, phan bo 5-10% danh muc
C. Khi thi truong chung khoan giam
explanation: Vang la tai san phong ve lam phat va bat on. Nen phan bo 5-10% danh muc vao vang (vang mieng hoac ETF vang). Khong nen 'all-in' vao vang.

text: Muc giam tru gia canh ban than khi tinh thue TNCN tai Viet Nam la bao nhieu?
explanation: Muc giam tru gia canh ban than la 11 trieu dong/thang (132 trieu/nam). Thu nhap duoi muc nay khong phai dong thue TNCN tu tien luong.

text: Muc giam tru gia canh cho moi nguoi phu thuoc khi tinh thue TNCN la bao nhieu?
explanation: Moi nguoi phu thuoc (con cai, bo me khong co thu nhap) duoc giam tru 4.4 trieu/thang. Can dang ky nguoi phu thuoc voi co quan thue de duoc giam tru.

text: Nguoi lao dong dong bao hiem xa hoi (BHXH) bat buoc bao nhieu phan tram luong?
explanation: Nguoi lao dong dong 10.5% luong: 8% BHXH + 1.5% BHYT + 1% BHTN. Ngoai ra, nguoi su dung lao dong dong them 21.5%. Tong cong 32% luong dong bao hiem.

text: The BHYT (bao hiem y te) chi tra bao nhieu phan tram chi phi kham chua benh dung tuyen?
explanation: BHYT chi tra 80% chi phi kham chua benh khi kham dung tuyen. Kham trai tuyen chi duoc 40-60% tuy cap benh vien. Vi vay luon nen kham dung tuyen de tiet kiem.

text: Vi dien tu nhu MoMo, ZaloPay co duoc bao hiem tien gui nhu ngan hang khong?
choices: A. Co, duoc bao hiem nhu ngan hang
B. Khong, tien trong vi dien tu khong duoc bao hiem tien gui
C. Chi duoc bao hiem neu so du duoi 50 trieu
D. Tuy loai vi dien tu
explanation: Vi dien tu KHONG phai ngan hang nen khong duoc Bao hiem tien gui Viet Nam bao ve. Chi nen giu so tien vua du chi tieu trong vi, khong nen de so lon.

text: Diem tin dung (credit score) tai Viet Nam duoc su dung chu yeu boi to chuc nao?
choices: B. Trung tam Thong tin Tin dung Quoc gia (CIC)
explanation: CIC (Credit Information Center) thuoc Ngan hang Nha nuoc quan ly du lieu tin dung ca nhan. Diem CIC tu 300-900. Ngan hang tra cuu CIC truoc khi duyet vay.

text: Dau hieu nao cho thay ban co the dang gap lua dao tai chinh?
choices: A. Lai suat cao hon gui tiet kiem ngan hang
B. Hua loi nhuan co dinh 20-30%/nam, khong rui ro
C. Can phai mo tai khoan tai ngan hang
D. Co hop dong va giay to phap ly
explanation: Hua loi nhuan co dinh rat cao (20-30%/nam) va 'khong rui ro' la dau hieu kinh dien cua lua dao Ponzi. Khong co dau tu nao vua loi nhuan cao vua khong rui ro.

text: De bao ve tien truoc lam phat, cach nao sau day la KHONG hieu qua?
choices: A. Gui tiet kiem lai suat cao hon lam phat
B. Dau tu vao co phieu hoac quy
C. Giu tien mat o nha
explanation: Giu tien mat o nha se mat gia theo lam phat. Neu lam phat 4%/nam, 100 trieu tien mat sau 5 nam chi con suc mua tuong duong ~82 trieu. Can dau tu de tien sinh loi.

text: Nguoi doc than khong co nguoi phu thuoc nen co quy du phong bang bao nhieu thang chi tieu?
explanation: Nguoi doc than, khong nguoi phu thuoc, cong viec on dinh chi can 3-4 thang. Nguoi co gia dinh, con nho, thu nhap khong on dinh nen co 6-12 thang.

text: Ty le no tren thu nhap (DTI - Debt-to-Income) an toan la bao nhieu?
explanation: DTI = tong tien tra no hang thang / thu nhap hang thang. DTI duoi 40% la an toan. Tren 50% la nguy hiem — ban dang dung qua nhieu thu nhap de tra no.

text: So sanh gui tiet kiem co ky han va khong ky han, dieu nao dung?
choices: A. Khong ky han luon co lai suat cao hon
B. Co ky han co lai suat cao hon nhung khong rut truoc han duoc
C. Co ky han co lai suat cao hon, rut truoc han duoc nhung huong lai khong ky han
D. Hai loai co lai suat nhu nhau
explanation: Gui co ky han lai suat cao hon (5-7%/nam vs 0.1-0.5% khong ky han). Rut truoc han van duoc nhung chi huong lai suat khong ky han. Nen chia nho de gui nhieu so.

text: Khi mua nha, ngan hang thuong cho vay toi da bao nhieu phan tram gia tri nha?
explanation: Ngan hang thuong cho vay 60-70% gia tri nha. Ban can co 30-40% von tu co. Ngoai ra con phi cong chung, thue truoc ba, phi sang ten (~2-3% gia nha).

text: Dieu gi xay ra neu ban chi tra muc toi thieu (minimum payment) the tin dung moi thang?
choices: B. Bi tinh lai tren TOAN BO so du, khong chi phan chua tra
explanation: Tra toi thieu (thuong 5% so du) giup khong bi phat nhung VAN bi tinh lai tren toan bo so du goc. Voi lai 2-4%/thang, no se tang rat nhanh nhu cau tuyet.

text: App gia mao ngan hang thuong lua nan nhan bang cach nao?
choices: A. Gui email chinh thuc tu ngan hang
B. Gui link gia mao yeu cau nhap OTP, mat khau
C. Goi dien tu tong dai ngan hang
D. Gui thu bao dam qua buu dien
explanation: Lua dao phishing gui link/app gia mao giong ngan hang de lay OTP va mat khau. Ngan hang KHONG BAO GIO yeu cau cung cap OTP qua link. Luon truy cap app/web chinh thuc.

text: Khi lam phat tang cao, nen dieu chinh danh muc dau tu nhu the nao?
choices: A. Ban het co phieu, giu tien mat
B. Tang ty trong tai san thuc (vang, bat dong san) va co phieu nganh thiet yeu
C. Gui tat ca vao tiet kiem
D. Vay nhieu hon de dau tu
explanation: Khi lam phat cao, tai san thuc (vang, BDS) thuong tang gia theo. Co phieu nganh thiet yeu (thuc pham, nang luong) on dinh hon. Tien mat va tiet kiem lai thap se mat gia.
